titleStmt.title: SII 20.221: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 221. (B.K. No. 102 of 1935-36.) HIRĒBIDRI, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the gate-way of the Kallēśvara temple.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1205, Svabhānu, Āshāḍha, ba. 30, Sunday, Mithunasaṁkramaṇa. The tithi corresponds to A.D. 1283, June 26, Saturday, instead of Sunday. The month was Adhika-Āshāḍha.

The inscription records a gift of land by Padmaladēvi, wife of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Vikramādityadēva of the Gutta family, for worship and offerings to god Svayaṁbhu Kalināthadēva of Bidirahaḷḷi, after leaving the feet of Tripurāntakadēva, son of Mallikārjunadēva. The record gives a short genealogy of Vikramāditya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgasirastuṁgacaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanaga
rāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . śrī saraśvatyāya namaḥ .
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ śrīgurubhyō(ṁ) namaḥ . śrīsūryyāya namaḥ
© svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ bhujabaḷaprauḍhapratāpacakravartti śrī vī
ra rāmacaṁdradēvavijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṟiddhipravarddhamānamācaṁ
drārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vujjēniya puravarādhīśvaraṁ caṁdraguptānvayaṁ gu
ttakuḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍa kadanapracaṁḍa haṁnibbara gaṁḍa maṁḍaḷikabhairavaṁ saraṇāgatava
jrapaṁjaraṁ śrīsvayaṁbhu paraśuliṁga gaḷaganāthadēvara dibyaśrīpādapadmārādhakaru
mappa śrīvikramādityadēvana pratāpaveṁteṁdaḍe Adaṭiṁdurkkida vairi pi
ranāṭaṁdikki caṁḍāsiyiṁ kadanakkaṁji śaraṇgevaṁda nṛparaṁ kādartthigēta vadī
dī nijapratāpadodavaṁ śrīvikramādityanāspadavaṁ pōlva parīga
� dharābhāgadoḷū . va . Antu pogayisuva guttarājya ḷage bidira
�ḷḷiya grāmaveṁteṁdaḍe . vri . biḍadeṟagirdda śāḷivanadiṁ sahakāradaśōkanaṁ
�nāvaḷigaḷinoppuvikṣuvanasaṁtatiyiṁ śukakōkiḷaṁgaḷiṁdeḷata geygaḷiṁ
�seva puṟpavanaṁgaḷiniṁtu nōḍe biccaḷisidarāro pēḷu bidirahaḷḷiyaṁ salemāva
dhātriyoḷu . vikaśitaśatakīrtti hētucāritramūrtti guṇagaṇaparipūrtti bō
dhasadvipavṛtti Avanatitavatsaḷaṁ sarvvadā dhīrasatpaṁ bhavatu bhavatu śataśatāyu vikramāṁ
ka sthirāyu . vri . kaliyiṁ vikramagarbbhasaṁbhavamanudārōdāttane nōrppaḍākali gu
ttānuja yudhugarūpayutano maiḷāṁbikāndanano kuladuddhāraka puṇnyakīrtti
tāṁ caṁdraguptānvayanu nelegoṁḍoppuvane dharāvaḷeyadoḷu śrī jō
mabhūpāḷakanu . vri . kuḍuveṁ hōdaṟabdhige niyanutaṁ hataydu rātrigaḷaṁ
biḍadōraṁtaḍeyāḍisuttaṁ paḍiraṁ mātāḍi bappāgaḷuṁ paḍeyiṁgārcciye
nōḍutippara sī tāṁ kuḍuvare kuḍuguṁ padmalatege kuṁkumakēṁ kirāta
kusmacchāyāsuvarṇnaṁgaḷaṁ . vri . birudara gaṁḍamaṁḍaḷika vikramadēvanoḷāṁ
pa vairiyiṁ turagadaḷaṁgaḷaṁ bisuṭu kaimugiduṭṭudavikki pu diradaḍarddi
[®de] bobbiṟidu nalidosedāḍuta bāya biḍuvaraṁ karuṇise kādanō subhaṭa
vikramanō raṇaraṁgaśūdrakanu . Are saṁghīna mātuEkatājhame jājā
taya paredāridrāripumahvanite kāneṇasaṁjāyajatu śrī guttā(ṁ)nva
ya cakravarttiya dhare śrī jōmabhūpāḷaremāgo jāyatē yiṣṭasiddhiyara
geredakaṇaṁ dēhi dharādhāriṇige negaḷdha tuṁgātīrada dāḷiṁteseva bīḍiṁ haḷeya grā
mārāri mecci nelasida kalidēvara dēvanakhiḷadēvaradēvaṁ . svasti śrīmatu yāda
vanārāyaṇaṁ bhujabaḷaprauḍhapratāpacakravartti śrīvīrarāmacaṁdradēva
na vijayarājyōdayada sakavarṣa 1205 neya svabhānu saṁvatsarada Āśāḍa ba
huḷa 30 Ādivāra mithuna saṁkramūṇadaṁdu śrīmanumahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara
vikramādityadēvanarasi padmaladēviyaru kalidēvanige biṭṭa dharmma vūriṁ paḍuvalu
si huṇiseya keyi mattaru 3 vūriṁ baḍagalu hosavūra dāriyiṁ pa
ḍuvalu mattaru 1 gauḍageḻeya keḷagaṇa goṁḍalu Eraḍu sahita
Adaṟiṁ mūḍaṇa caṁcila Ākkasāleya keyiṁ mūḍalu mattaru 1 kuṟi
bana keṟeya keḷagaṇa gadde boṁmeyanāyakana keyiṁ teṁkalu cikkareya matta
ru 4 vūriṁ teṁkaṇa kalidēvara sa ttaṇa hāḷa keyi mattaru 1 [.] naḍuhaṭṭiya
Aramaneyiṁ teṁkalu 40 kayi mane biḍāra dēvariṁ paḍuvaṇa tudi keyi I
ṣṭuvanū sarvvanamasyavāgi mallikārjjunadēvara maga tripurāṁtakadēvana kālaṁ karcci
śrī svayaṁbhu kalināthadēvargge trikālada naivēdya �dīvige Aṁgabhōga raṁga bhōgavaṁ
naḍasuvaṁtāgi dhārāpūrvvakavāgi koṭṭa dharmmayiṁtī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavarge vāra
ṇāsi kurukṣētradoḷu sāsira kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ hoṁnalu kaṭṭisi sahasra brāhma
ṇargge koṭṭa puṁṇya svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭhivarupa sahasrāṇi vi
viṣṭhāyūṁ jāyatē krimiḥ kōṭi payaṁkavileyane kōṭi tapōdhanara vēdavittara [ma(ṁ)ne]kkōṭiyane
kkōṭitīrtthada kōṭimahādinadoḷaḷidanidanaḷidavanū . vūroḍeyanakke maṁneya vūrāḷarasa
rakke pāpi nāraḷidaḍe rauravakke gaḷagaḷaniḷigū . maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 20.221 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
